name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_inspection
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_inspection' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`StartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`StartReferencePointName` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`StartDistancePast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledDateFrom` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledDateTo` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EarlyStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`PlannedScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`StartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`StartReferencePointName` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`StartDistancePast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledDateFrom` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledDateTo` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EarlyStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`PlannedScheduledDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ModifiedUser|StartDate|StartReferencePointName|StartDistancePast|CreatedDate|CreatedUser|ScheduledDate|ScheduledDateFrom|ScheduledDateTo|CompletedDate|CompletedUser|DueDate|EarlyStartDate|PlannedScheduledDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_inspection`
